headline: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Inflation worries dragged the major averages down on Wednesday, with the Dow Industrials falling about 768 points to its closing low for 2026.

headline: General Mills (GIS) Lags Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: General Mills (GIS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -13.30% and -0.94%, respectively, for the quarter ended February 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
